title: 英國體制嘅senior lecturer 同埋assistant professor 有乜嘢唔同？

replies.msg: 喺英國我見好多研究好勁嘅學者都係senior lecturer， 而唔係professor 嗰一條隊。 甚至有senior lecturer 可以做department head. 香港好似lecturer 嘅地位會比professor 嗰一邊嘅為低， 同埋好多 lecturer 都唔係點做研究

真心想問有咩分別？

雖然都係教畜

名唔同，英式senior lecturer約等於美式associate processor
傳統英式ranking大約係：lecturer、senior lecturer、reader、professor
但係近年都畀美式入侵
https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academic_ranks_in_the_United_Kingdom

quote.msg:

replies.msg:
香港個模式最奇怪
lecturer -> senior lecturer->assistant professor ->associate-> Professor

明明英國senior lecturer已經係assistant professor

replies.msg:
香港lecturer係teaching track，好少轉去research track喎
英國嘅lecturer本身已經係research track
英國制式 (senior) lecturer of university 等於 assistant prof。除非寫明 teaching focused 否則都要 research requirement。英式有好多名，例如有時你見到 Reader 其實已等於 Professor。

replies.msg: 香港 lecturer 同 professor 兩條track

香港有啲U/fac
teaching and research 可以分得好開

lecturer直頭唔係tenure track

replies.msg:
香港而家基本上都係跟美國 (係90年代同之前就跟英國), lecturer同senior lecturer係teaching track (美國都係)
tenure track係AP, associate prof, (full) prof, distinguished prof (or something equivalent)
香港唯一獨特的係有chair prof (or equivalent)呢個rank, 可能係英制轉美制留落黎的問題, 個人覺得介乎full prof同distinguished prof, 可能係對應英制的(full) prof
